import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/org-admin/SubscriptionUsage.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/SubscriptionUsage.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { Users, FileText, Sparkles, TrendingUp, AlertTriangle, CreditCard, Package } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
export default function SubscriptionUsage() {
  const subscriptionData = {
    planName: "Professional Plan",
    planType: "Annual",
    renewalDate: "2026-12-15",
    users: {
      total: 50,
      used: 38
    },
    policies: {
      total: 100,
      created: 67
    },
    aiTokens: {
      total: 1e4,
      used: 6200,
      remaining: 3800
    }
  };
  const getUsagePercentage = (used, total) => {
    return Math.round(used / total * 100);
  };
  const getStatusColor = (percentage) => {
    if (percentage >= 90) return "red";
    if (percentage >= 80) return "yellow";
    return "green";
  };
  const usersPercentage = getUsagePercentage(subscriptionData.users.used, subscriptionData.users.total);
  const policiesPercentage = getUsagePercentage(subscriptionData.policies.created, subscriptionData.policies.total);
  const tokensPercentage = getUsagePercentage(subscriptionData.aiTokens.used, subscriptionData.aiTokens.total);

$RefreshReg$(_c, "SubscriptionUsage");

  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/SubscriptionUsage.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/SubscriptionUsage.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
